text: bemaamar harishon kataveti teofilos 'al-kol asher hechel yeshu'a la'asot ulelamed
'ad-hayom asher luqach lamarom acharey tsaoto berucha haqodesh et-hashelichim asher-bachar bahem
vaasher gam-hiteyatsev lahem beotot rabot acharey 'unoto vayera aleyhem areba'im yom vayedaber 'al-malekhut haelohim
uveakhelo 'imahem tsiva otam levileti sur mirushalayim ulehochil lehavetachat haav asher shema'etem mimeni
ki yochanan hitebil bamayim veatem titavelu berucha haqodesh beqarov acharey hayamim haele
vayehi behiteasefam yachedav vayishealuhu lemor adoneynu hatashiv ba'et hazot et-hamalekhut leyiserael
vayomer aleyhem lo lakhem lada'at ha'itim vehazemanim asher qava' haav beshiletano shel
aval tiseu gevura bevo 'aleykhem rucha haqodesh viheyitem 'eday birushalayim uvekhal yehuda uveshomeron ve'ad-qetse haarets
vayehi kekhaloto ledaber zot ho'ala vehem roim vayisaehu 'anan mineged 'eyneyhem
vayabitu acharayv hashamayim ba'aloto vehine sheney anashim levushey vadim nitsavim 'aleyhem
vayomeru aneshey hagalil mah-ta'amedu ve'eyneykhem lashamayim ze yeshu'a asher ho'ala me'aleykhem hashamayim bo yavo kaasher reitem oto 'ole lamarom
vayifenu vayelekhu yerushalayema min-hahar haniqera har hazeytim vehu qarov lirushalayim kederekh techum shabat
vayavou ha'ira vaya'alu el-ha'aliya asher yashevu-vah peteros veya'aqov veyochanan veanederay filipos vetoma bar-talemay umatay ya'aqov ben-chalefay veshime'on haqana vihuda ben-ya'aqov
kal ele hayu shoqedim yachedav belev echad bitefila uvetachanunim hem vehanashim 'im mireyam em yeshu'a ve'im-echayv
uvayamim hahem qam peteros betokh haachim umisepar shemot haniqehalim yachad kemea ve'eserim vayomar
anashim achim tsarikh haya sheyimale hakatuv haze asher rucha haqodesh diber miqedem befi david 'al-yehuda asher haya lemolikh et-tofesey yeshu'a
ki-haya nimene itanu vezakha begoral hasherut haze
vehine hu qana lo sade bisekhar harishe'a vayipol 'al-panayv aretsa vayibaqa' batavekh vayishafekhu kal-me'ayv
venoda' hadavar haze lekhal-yoshevey yerushalayim vayiqare bisefatam lasade hahu chaqal dema hu sede hadam
ki khatuv besefer tehilim tehi-tirato neshama veal-yehi vah yshev veomer pequdato yiqach acher
ve'al-ken tsarikh sheechad min-haanashim asher hitehalekhu itanu kal-yemey asher adoneynu yeshu'a yotse vava lefaneynu
hachel mitevilat yochanan 'ad-yom hilaqecho meitanu yiheye 'imanu le'ed techiyato min-hametim
vaya'amidu shenayim et-yosef haniqera var-shaba vehu mekhune yusetos veet matiya
vayitepalelu vayomeru ata yeho hayode'a kal-halevavot hareeh-na min-hashenayim haele et-haechad asher bachareta bo
laqachat et-goral hasherut haze vehashelichut asher 'avar mimena yehuda lahalokh el-meqomo shelo
vayapilu goralot vayipol hagoral 'al-matiya vayisafach el-'ashetey 'asar hashelichim
uveyom melot shive'at hashavu'ot neesefu khulam lev echad
vayehi qol ra'ash min-hashamayim piteom keqol rucha se'ara vayemale et-kal-habayit asher hem yshevim bo
vateraeyna aleyhem leshonot miteparedot bemaree esh vatanucha achat achat 'al kal-echad mehem
vayimaleu khulam rucha haqodesh vayachelu ledaber bileshonot acherot kaasher netanam harucha lesaper
uvirushalayim shakhenu yehudim yireey elohim mibeyn kal-goy asher tachat kal hashamayim
vayehi biheyot qol hara'ash hahu vayiqavetsu 'am-rav vayiheyu nevukhim ki khal-ish shome'a otam medaberim kisefat aretso
vayishetomamu vayitemehu vayomeru ish el-re'ehu hine hamedaberim haele halo khulam beney hagalil hema
veeykh shome'im anachenu otam ish kisefat-erets moladetenu
paretiyim umadim ve'eylamim veyshevey aram naharayim yehuda veqapodeqiya panetos veaseya
perugeya ufamepuleya mitserayim vechevel luv asher 'al-yad qurini vehabaim meromi yehudim vegerim
keretim ve'arevim hine anachenu shome'im otam mesaperim bileshonoteynu gedulot haelohim
vayitemehu khulam vayibahelu vayomeru ish el-achiv mah-zot
vaacherim la'agu vayomeru ki-meleey 'asis hema
az ya'amod peteros ve'ashetey he'asar 'imo vayisa et-qolo vayedaber aleyhem lemor aneshey yehuda veyshevey yerushalayim kulam zot yado'a tede'u vehaazinu el-devaray
ki haanashim haele lo shikorim hema kaasher amaretem ki shalsh sha'ot bayom 'ata
vehu haamur 'al-yedey yoel hanavi
vehaya baacharit hayamim neum elohim eshepokh et-ruchi 'al-kal-basar venibeu beneykhem uvenoteykhem uvachureykhem chezeyonot yireu veziqeneykhem chalomot yachalomun
vegam 'al-'avaday ve'al-shifechotay bayamim hahema eshepokh et-ruchi venibau
venatati mofetim bashamayim mima'al veotot baarets mitachat dam vaesh vetimerot 'ashan
hashemesh yehafekh lechshekh vehayarecha ledam lifeney bo yom yeho hagadol vehanora
vehaya kol asher-yiqera beshem-yeho yimalet
aneshey yiserael shime'u hadevarim haele yeshu'a hanatseri haish asher neeman lakhem meet haelohim bigevurot uvemofetim uveotot asher haelohim 'asa 'al-yado betokhakhem kaasher yeda'etem gam-atem
oto hanimesar 'al-pi 'atsat haelohim hanecheratsa vidi'ato miqedem leqachetem uvidey resha'im hoqa'etem vaharagetem
velohim heqimo min-hametim behatiro et-cheveley hamavet lefi shel haya veyado lehachaziq bo
ki-david omer 'alayv shiviti yeho lenegedi tamid ki mimini bal-emot
lakhen samach libi vayagel kevodi af-besari yishekon lavetach
ki lo-ta'azov nafeshi lisheol lo-titen chasidekha lireot shachat
todi'eni arechot chayim sva' semachot et-paneykha
anashim achim hanichu li vaadabera aleykhem kaasher 'im levavi david avinu met veniqebar uqevurato itanu hi 'ad-hayom haze
vehu navi veyode'a et-hashevu'a asher nisheba' lo haelohim lehaqim et hamashicha kefi habasar miperi chalatsayv lehoshivo 'al-kiseo
lakhen bachazoto lemerachoq diber 'al-tequmat hamashicha ki lo-ne'ezeva nafesho lisheol vegam-besaro lo-raa shachat
hu yeshu'a asher heqim elohim min-hametim vaanachenu khulanu 'edayv
ve'ata acharey hinaseo bimin haelohim laqach meet aviv et-havetachat rucha haqodesh vayishepokh et-asher atem roim veshome'im
ki david lo 'ala hashamayema vehine hu omer neum-yeho ladoni shev limini
'ad-ashit oyeveykha hadom lerageleykha
lakhen yeda'-na beyt-yiserael kulo barur ki haelohim sam et-yeshu'a ze asher tselavetem leadon ulemashicha
vayehi kheshame'am hite'atsevu el-libam vayomeru el-peteros veel-shear hashelichim anashim achim mah-na'ase
vayomer peteros aleyhem shuvu midarekheykhem vehitavelu kal-ish mikem leshem yeshu'a hamashicha liselichat chataeykhem veqibaletem et-matenat rucha haqodesh
ki lakhem hahavetacha veliveneykhem ulekhol harechoqim lekhal-asher qore yeho eloheynu lahem
vaya'ad 'od bahem bidevarim acherim harebe vayazehirem lemor himaletu na min-hador ha'iqesh haze
vayeqabelu et-devaro besimecha vayitavelu uvayom hahu nosefu kishelshet alefey nafesh
vayiheyu shoqedim 'al-torat hashelichim ve'al-hahitechaberut ve'al-betsi'at halechem ve'al-hatefila
vatipol eyma 'al-kal-nefesh umofetim rabim veotot na'aso 'al-yedey hashelichim birushalayim veeyma gedola hayeta 'al-kulam
vekhal-hamaaminim hiteachadu yachad vekhal-asher lahem haya lenachalat kulam
vayimekeru et-achuzatam veet-rekhusham vayechalequ lekhulam leish ish dey machesoro
veyom yom hayu shoqedim liheyot bamiqedash lev echad vayivetse'u et-halechem babayit babayit
vayokhelu mezonam begila uvetom levav vayeshabechu et-haelohim vayimetseu chen be'eyney khal-ha'am vehaadon hosif yom yom 'al-ha'eda et-hanosha'im
ufeteros veyochanan hayu 'olim yachedav el-hamiqedash litefilat haminecha basha'a hateshi'it
veish echad pisecha mibeten imo huva shama asher hoshivuhu yom yom lifeney sha'ar hamiqedash haniqera sha'ar hamehudar lisheol matanot meet baey hamiqedash
vayehi kireoto et-peteros veet-yochanan baim el-hamiqedash vayevaqesh meitam tsedaqa
vayisetakel-bo peteros vegam-yochanan vayomer elayv habita eleynu
vayasem panayv aleyhem vayeqav laqachat meitam matana
vayomer peteros kesef vezahav eyn-li vaasher beyadi oto etenenu lakh beshem-yeshu'a hamashicha hanatseri qum hitehalekh
vayochez beyad yemino vayeqimehu vayechezequ fiteom ragelayv veqaresulayv
vayaqam 'al ragelayv vayehalekh vayavo itam el-hamiqedash vehu mitehalekh umedaleg umeshabecha et-haelohim
vayireehu kal-ha'am mitehalekh umeshabecha et-haelohim
vayakiru oto ki hu hayshev lisheol tsedaqa besha'ar hamiqedash hamehudar vayimaleu shama vetimahon 'al hana'asa lo
vayehi hu machaziq befeteros uveyochanan vayarats aleyhem kal-ha'am el-haulam haniqera ulam shel-shelomo vayishetomemu
vayare peteros vaya'an vayomer el-ha'am aneshey yiserael ma atem temehim 'al-hadavar haze umah-tisetakelu vanu keilu bekhochenu uvachasidutenu hu mehalekh
elohey averaham elohey yitsechaq velohey ya'aqov elohey avoteynu hu peer et-'avedo yeshu'a asher atem mesaretem vekhichashetem bo bifeney filatos keshehaya dan lefatero
aval atem kichashetem baqadosh uvatsadiq usheeletem ki-yinaten lakhem ish rotsecha bevaqashatekhem
veet-sar hachayim hamitem asher haelohim heqim min-hametim vaanachenu 'edayv
ve'al emunat shemo chizaq shemo et-haish haze asher atem roim umakirim veemunatenu vo he'eletah-lo et-haarukha hazot le'eyney khulekhem
ve'ata achay yode'a ani ki viveli-da'at 'asitem gam-atem gam-rasheykhem
vehaelohim kakha mile et asher higid miqedem befi khal-neviayv ki ye'une hamashicha
lakhen hinachamu veshuvu veyimachu chataeykhem
lema'an asher-yavou yemey revacha milifeney yeho veyishelach et-asher ye'ado lakhem miqedem et-yeshu'a hamashicha
asher tsarikh sheyeqabelu oto hashamayim 'ad-yemey shuv kal-hadevarim letiqunam kaasher diber haelohim befi-neviayv haqedoshim mimey 'olam
hen mshe amar el-avoteynu navi yaqim lakhem yeho eloheykhem miqerev acheykhem kamoni elayv tishema'un kekhol asher yedaber aleykhem
vehaya kal-hanefesh asher lo tishema' el-hanavi hahu venikhereta me'ameyha
vegam kal-haneviim mishemuel vaasher nibeu acharayv kulam higidu merosh et-hayamim haele
atem beney haneviim uveney haberit asher karat haelohim 'im-avoteynu beamero el-averaham veniverekhu vezare'akha kol mishepechot haadama
lakhem barishona he'emid haelohim et-'avedo yeshu'a vayishelachehu levarekh etekhem beshuvekhem ish mero'a ma'aleleykhem
vayehi bedaberam el-ha'am vayaqumu 'aleyhem hakohanim unegid hamiqedash vehatsaduqim
ki-chara lahem 'al-asher limedu et-ha'am vehigidu et-techiyat hametim beyeshu'a
vayishelechu yadam bahem vayanichum bamishemar lemachorat hayom hahu ki haya 'arev
verabim mehashome'im et-hadavar heeminu vayehi miseparam kachameshet alafim ish
vayehi mimachorat vayiqahalu sareyhem rasheyhem veziqeneyhem vesofereyhem yerushalayim
vechanan hakohen hagadol veqayafa veyochanan vealekhesanederos vekhol asher mimishepachat hakohen hagadol
vaya'amidu otam batavekh vayishealum lemor beey-ze khocha uveey-ze shem 'asitem zot
vayimale peteros rucha haqodesh vayomer aleyhem shema'uni rashey ha'am veziqeney yiserael
im-anachenu nechaqer hayom 'al-hatova asher 'asinu leish chole usheeletem bame ze nosha'
yivada' lekhulekhem ulekhal-'am yiserael ki-veshem yeshu'a hamashicha hanatseri asher tselavetem vaasher haelohim heqimo min-hametim bishemo 'omed haish haze bari lifeneykhem
vehu haeven asher measetem atem habonim vatehi lerosh pina
veeyn hayeshu'a beacher ki lo nitan tachat hashamayim shem acher liveney adam asher-bo nivashe'a
vayehi kaasher rau et-omets lev peteros veyochanan vehivinu ki hedeyotot hema velo va'aley-chakhema vayitemahu vehem hikiru ki hayu holekhim 'im-yeshu'a
aval bireotam et haish hanirepa 'omed etselam lo matseu ledaber negedam davar
vayetsauu otam latset chutsa misanehederin vayiteya'atsu yachedav
vayomeru mah-na'ase laanashim haele hine ot galuy na'asa 'al-yedeyhem vegam-mefuresam lekhal-yshevey yerushalayim velo nukhal lekhachesh bo
akh lema'an lo-yirebe hadavar ba'am veyiferots nige'arah-bam levileti daber 'od lekhal-adam bashem haze
vayiqereu otam vayetsauum asher lo-yedaberu davar velo yelamedu beshem yeshu'a
vaya'anu peteros veyochanan vayomeru aleyhem hanakhon hu lifeney haelohim shemo'a lakhem yoter mishemo'a lelohim shifetu atem
ki lo nukhal anachenu lachadol ledaber et asher rainu veshama'enu
vayosifu lige'ar-bam vayifeteru otam baasher lo-matseu davar la'anosh otam mipeney ha'am ki khulam mehalalim et-haelohim 'al-hana'asa
ki ben-areba'im shana vama'ela haya haish hahu asher na'asah-'imo ot harefua hazot
veacharey hipateram bau el-acheyhem vayesaperu lahem et asher ameru aleyhem rashey hakohanim vehazeqenim
vayehi khaasher shame'u et-zot vayiseu et-qolam belev echad lelohim vayomeru adonay ata hael ha'ose et-hashamayim veet-haarets veet-hayam veet-kal asher-bam
asher amareta befi 'avedekha david avinu berucha haqodesh lama rageshu goyim uleumim yehegu riq
yiteyatsevu malekhey erets verozenim nosedu yachad 'al-yeho ve'al-meshicho
ki amenam nosedu ba'ir hazot horedos ufanetios pilatos 'im-hagoyim uleumey yiserael 'al-yeshu'a 'avedekha haqadosh asher mashacheta
la'asot et asher yadekha va'atsatekha miqedem gazera liheyot
ve'ata adonay ree et-ga'aratam veten la'avadeykha ledaber et-devarekha bekhal-omets libam
binetotekha et-yadekha lemarepe velatet otot umofetim beshem yeshu'a 'avedekha haqadosh
vayehi kaasher hitepalalu vayana' hamaqom asher hayu niqehalim sham vayimaleu khulam rucha haqodesh vayedaberu et-devar haelohim beomets levav
uqehal hamaaminim haya lahem lev echad venefesh achat veeyn ish mehem omer 'al-asher beyado li hu ki hakol haya lahem lenachalat kulam
uvigevura raba ya'idu hashelichim 'al-tequmat haadon yeshu'a vechesed gadol haya 'al kulam
ki lo-haya vahem chasar davar ki khal-ba'aley sadot uvatim makheru otam vayaviu et-kesef mechiram
vayesimuhu lerageley hashelichim vayutan lekhal-ish vaish dey machesoro
veyosef asher kinuhu hashelichim beshem bar-naba perusho ven-hanechama ish leveyt levi asher nolad beerets qiferos
gam-lo haya sade vayimekerehu vayave et-hakesef vayesimehu lerageley hashelichim
veish echad ushemo chananeya veisheto shapira makhar et-achuzato
vayiqach min-hamechir vayaseter veisheto yoda'at gam-hi vecheleq echad hevi vayasem lerageley hashelichim
vayomer peteros chananeya lama ze mile hasatan et-levavekha leshaqer lerucha haqodesh ulehasetir mimechir hasade
halo shelekha haya terem himakhero vegam-acharey nimekar haya veyadekha velama sameta 'al-levavekha hadavar haze lo shiqareta liveney adam ki im-lelohim
vekhishemo'a chananeya et-hadevarim haele nafal aretsa vayigeva' vatehi yirea gedola 'al kal-hashome'im
vayaqumu hatse'irim vayaasefu oto vayisauhu hachutsa vayiqeberuhu
vayehi kemishelsh sha'ot vatavo isheto vehi lo yade'a et asher na'asa
vaya'an peteros vayomer eleyha imeri-li havamechir haze mekharetem et-hasade vatomer hen bamechir haze
vayomer peteros eleyha lamah-ze no'atsetem lenasot et-rucha yeho hine vapetach rageley hameqaberim et-ishekh venaseu otakh hachutsa
vatipol piteom leragelayv vatigeva' vehane'arim bau vehine meta vayisauha hachutsa vayiqeberuha etsel ishah
vatehi yirea gedola 'al kal-haqahal ve'al kal-hashome'im et-ele
vaye'aso otot umofetim rabim beqerev ha'am 'al-yedey hashelichim vekhulam neesefu lev echad beulam shel-shelomo
umin-haacherim eyn ish asher melao libo lehilaot 'aleyhem veha'am hoqir otam
ve'od nisepechu maaminim el-haadon anashim venashim harebe meod
'ad ki-naseu et-hacholim el-harechovot vayesimum 'al-mitot umishekavot lema'an asher yelekh peteros venafal akhe-tsilo 'al-echad mehem
vegam-hamon-'am he'arim asher misaviv niqebetsu yerushalayim meviim et-hacholim veet-hanilechatsim meruchot temeot vayerafeu kulam
vayaqam hakohen hagadol vekhol asher ito vehem aneshey kat hatsaduqim vayimaleu qinea
vayishelechu-yad bashelichim vayitenum bemishemar asher la'ir
vayehi balayela vayifetach maleakh yeho et-daletey veyt-hakele vayotsiem lemor
lekhu vehiteyatsevu vamiqedash vedaberu el-ha'am et-kal-diverey hachayim haele

vehem keshame'am et-zot bau el-hamiqedash biheyot haboqer vayelamedu sham vayavo hakohen hagadol vaasher ito vayiqereu el-sanehederin veel-kal-ziqeney beney yiserael vayishelechu el-beyt haasurim lehavi otam
vayelekhu hamesharetim velo metsaum beveyt hakele vayashuvu vayagidu lemor
banu vehine beyt haasurim sagur umesugar vehashomerim 'omedim 'al-hapatach vanifetach velo matsanu vo adam
vayehi kishemo'a negid hamiqedash verashey hakohanim et-hadevarim haele vayiheyu nevokhim 'aleyhem vayomeru mah-tiheye zot
veish echad ba vayaged lahem lemor hine haanashim asher sametem bamishemar 'omedim hem bamiqedash umelamedim et-ha'am
vayelekh shama hanagid umesharetayv vayiqachem akhe-lo vechazeqa ki yareu mipeney ha'am pen yiseqelum
vayaviu otam vaya'amidum lifeney sanehederin vayishealem hakohen hagadol lemor
halo tsao tsivinu 'aleykhem levileti lamed bashem haze vehine miletem et-yerushalayim toratekhem vetachepetsu lehavi 'aleynu et-demey haish haze
vaya'an peteros vehashelichim vayomeru halo 'aleynu lehaqeshiv beqol elohim mehaqeshiv beqol beney adam
elohey avoteynu heqim et-yeshu'a asher shelachetem yedekhem bo vatitelu oto 'al-ha'ets
et-ze nise haelohim bimino lesar ulemoshi'a latet-teshuva leyiserael uselichat hachataim
vaanachenu 'edayv 'al-ele vegam-rucha haqodesh asher natan oto haelohim lashome'im beqolo
vayehi keshame'am vayiga' bam 'ad nafesh vayiteya'atsu laharog otam
vayaqam besanehederin echad min-haperushim gameliel shemo vehu more hatora mekhubad be'eyney khal-ha'am vayetsav lehotsi et-hashelichim hachutsa lizeman me'at
vayomer aleyhem aneshey yiserael hishameru lakhem mipeney haanashim haele bemah-sheta'aso lahem
ki lifeney hayamim haele qam todas vayiten et-nafesho keachad hagedolim vayidebequ-vo keareba' meot ish vayehareg vayiteparedu khol asher-shame'u elayv vayiheyu leayin
veacharayv qam yehuda hagelili bimey hamifeqad vayaset 'am rav acharayv vegam-hu neherag vekhol asher-shame'u elayv nafotsu
ve'ata ani omer aleykhem chidelu lakhem min-haanashim haele vehanichu lahem ki ha'etsa vehape'ula hazot im-meet adam hi tufar
veim-meet haelohim hi lo tukhelu lehafer ota pen-timatseu nilechamim et-haelohim
vayisheme'u elayv vayiqereu et-hashelichim vayalequ otam vayetsauu asher lo yedaberu beshem yeshu'a vayifeteru otam
vayetseu shemechim milifeney sanehederin 'al-ki zakhu laset 'al-shemo kelima
velo chadelu kal-yom lelamed bamiqedash uvabatim ulevaser et-besorat yeshu'a hamashicha
bayamim hahem kaasher ravu hatalemidim hayeta telunat hayehudim hayevanim 'al-ha'iveriyim 'al-asher he'elimu 'eyneyhem mealemenoteyhem levileti-tet lahen yom yom et-aruchatan
vayiqereu sheneym he'asar et-hamon hatalemidim vayomeru lo-nave lanu ki na'azov et-devar haelohim uneshamesh et-hashulechanot
lakhen achay beru-lakhem shive'a anashim miqirebekhem asher shem tov lahem umeleim rucha haqodesh vechakhema venafeqidem 'al-ha'ineyan haze

uva'avur zot kaasher niqereti lo nimena'eti mehalokh ve'ata eshealekhem 'al-mah-ze qeratem li

vayomar qareneylios nisheme'a tefilatekha vetsideqoteykha hayu lezikaron lifeney haelohim
ve'ata shelach el-yafo uqera eleykha et-shime'on hamekhune feteros mitegorer hu beveyt shime'on haburesi 'al-hayam asher bevoo yedaber-lakh
vaamaher vaeshelach eleykha veata heytaveta la'asot asher-bata elay vehinenu kulanu fo lifeney haelohim lishemo'a et-kal-asher tsuveyta bayehva
vayifetach peteros et-piv vayomar 'ata yada'eti veemet ki haelohim eynenu nose fanim
ki im-bekhal-'am va'am hayare oto ve'ose tsedeq ratsuy hu lefanayv
vayishelach et-devaro liveney yiserael vayevaser et-hashalom 'al-yedey yeshu'a hamashicha vehu adon hakol
atem yeda'etem et-hadavar hana'ase vekhal-yehuda hachel min-hagalil acharey hatevila asher-qara otah yochanan
et asher-mashach haelohim et-yeshu'a hanatseri berucha haqodesh uvigevura vaya'avor baarets 'ose chesed verofe et-kal-hanikhebashim tachat yad hasatan ki haelohim haya 'imo
vaanachenu 'edim 'al-kal-asher 'asa beerets hayehudim uvirushalayim vaasher hemituhu behoqi'am oto 'al-ha'ets
oto heqim haelohim bayom hashelishi vayitenehu leheraot begaluy
lo lekhal-ha'am ki im-lanu ha'edim asher haelohim bachar bahem merosh asher akhalenu veshatinu ito acharey qumo min-hametim
vayetsav otanu lehashemi'a la'am uleha'id ki oto sam haelohim leshofet hachayim vehametim
ve'alayv kal-haneviim me'idim ki yeqabelu selichat hachataim bishemo kal-hamaaminim bo
ufeteros 'odenu medaber hadevarim haele verucha haqodesh tsalecha 'al kal-hashome'im et-hadavar
vehamaaminim hamulim asher bau et-peteros tamehu ki-matenat rucha haqodesh nishepekha gam 'al-hagoyim
ki shame'u otam memalalim bileshonot umegadelim et-haelohim
vaya'an peteros vayomar hayukhal ish limeno'a et-hamayim mitevol et-ele asher qibelu et-rucha haqodesh gam-hem kamonu
vayetsav beshem haadon litebol otam vayevaqeshu mimenu lashevet itam yamim achadim
vayisheme'u hashelichim vehaachim asher bihuda ki-qibelu gam-hagoyim et-devar haelohim
vayehi kaasher 'ala feteros yerushalayim vayarivu 'imo hamulim lemor
el-anashim asher-lahem 'arela bata vetokhal itam lachem
vayachel peteros vayesaper lahem keseder et-asher qarahu lemor
mitepalel hayiti be'ir yafo vaeradam vaere maree vehineh-kheli kidemut mitepachat-bad gedola yored min-hashamayim vaturad beareba' kanefoteyha vatavo 'aday
vehisetakaleti vah vaavin vaere et-behemat haarets veet-hachaya veremes haadama ve'of hashamayim
vaeshema' gam-qol midaber elay qum peteros tevach veekhol
vaomar chalila li adoni ki kal-pigul vetame lo-va befi-me'olam
vaya'aneni haqol shenit min-hashamayim vayomar et-asher tihar haelohim ata al-tetameenu
vekhen haya shalsh pe'amim vehakol shav veho'ala hashamayema
vehine kherega' shelsha anashim 'omedim 'al petach habayit asher anokhi sham vehema sheluchim elay miqeysareya
vayomer elay harucha lalekhet itam ulevileti hitemahemeha vayelekhu iti gam-sheshet haachim haele vanavo el-beyt haish
vayaged-lanu et asher-raa hamaleakh nitsav beveyto veomer elayv shelach el-yafo anashim uqera eleykha et-shime'on hamekhune feteros
vehu yedaber eleykha devarim asher tivasha' bahem ata vekhal-beytekha
vekhaasher hachiloti ledaber tsalecha 'aleyhem rucha haqodesh kaasher tsalecha 'aleynu batechila
vaezekor et devar haadon asher amar yochanan hitebil bamayim veatem titavelu berucha haqodesh
ve'ata im-matana achat natan haelohim lahem velanu hamaaminim baadon yeshu'a hamashicha mi anokhi ki e'etsor lelohim
vayehi keshame'am zot vayacharishu vayehalalu et-haelohim vayomeru akhen gam-lagoyim natan haelohim hateshuva lachayim
vehanefotsim mipeney hatsara asher hayeta 'al-odot isetefanos halekhu vavau 'ad-pinuqeya veqiferos veaneteyokheya velo diberu et-hadavar ki im-el-hayehudim levadam
vayehi vetokham aneshey qiferos vequrini asher bau el-aneteyokheya vayedaberu gam-el-hayevanim vayevaseru otam et-haadon yeshu'a
vatehi 'imahem yad-yeho verabim heeminu vayashuvu el-haadon
vayishama' hadavar beazeney haqehila asher birushalayim vayishelechu et-bar-naba el-aneteyokheya
vayavo shama vayisemach kireoto et-chesed haelohim vayazeher et-kulam ledaveqa vaadon belev nakhon
ki ish tov haya umale rucha haqodesh veemuna vayeasefu laadon 'am rav
vayelekh bar-naba misham el-taresos levaqesh et-shaul vayimetsa oto vayeviehu el-aneteyokheya
vayiheyu yshevim yachad baqehila shana temima umelamedim 'am rav az huchal beaneteyokheya liqero et-hatalemidim beshem meshichiyim
vayehi bayamim hahem vayeredu neviim mirushalayim el-aneteyokheya
vayaqam echad mehem ushemo agavos vayaged 'al-pi harucha ki ra'av gadol yavo 'al-kal-yshevey tevel vayehi-khen bimey qelodeyos
vayiva'atsu hatalemidim lishelocha ish ish kaasher tasig yado le'ezerat haachim hayshevim bihuda
vekhen gam-'aso vayishelechu el-hazeqenim 'al-yedey bar-naba veshaul
ba'et hahi shalach hamelekh horedos et-yado lehara' laanashim min-haqahal
vayamet et-ya'aqov achi yochanan becharev
vayare ki-tov hadavar be'eyney hayehudim vayosef litepos gam-et-peteros vehayamim yemey chag-hamatsot
vayochez oto vayitenehu bemishemar vayimeserehu leareba' macheleqot shel-areba'a aneshey tsava leshamero ki amar leha'aloto acharey hapesach lifeney ha'am
peteros haya 'atsur bemishemar vehaqehila he'etira va'ado bechazeqa el-haelohim
vayehi valayela asher amar horedos lahavio machar ledin vayishan peteros beyn-sheney aneshey tsava vehu asur bishenayim ziqim veshomerey hapetach shomerim et-hamishemar
vehine maleakh yeho nitsav 'alayv veor nagah bacheder vayisepoq 'al-yerekh peteros vaye'irehu lemor qum mehera vayipelu moserotayv me'al yadayv
vayomer elayv hamaleakh chagor mateneykha vehane'el et-rageleykha vaya'as ken vayomer elayv 'ate me'ilekha velekh acharay
vayetse vayelekh acharayv velo yada' im-emet hu hana'aseh-lo 'al-yedey hamaleakh ki kemaree haya be'eynayv

vaya'averu derekh hamishemeret harishona vehasheniya vayavou 'ad-sha'ar habarezel asher yetseu vo ha'ira vayipatach hasha'ar lifeneyhem meelayv vayetseu hachutsa vaya'averu rechov echad vaya'al hamaleakh me'alayv piteom
vayehi beshuv da'eto 'alayv vayomer peteros 'ata ze yada'eti veemet ki haelohim shalach et-maleakho vayefaleteni miyad horedos umikal-mezimat 'am hayehudim
hu chshev kazot vehu va 'ad-beyt mireyam em yochanan hamekhune mareqos asher niqehalu-sham rabim vehem mitepalalim yachad
vayidepoq 'al-delet hasha'ar vatigash na'ara lehaqeshiv ushemah rodi
vataker et-qol peteros umisimechatah lo-fatecha lo et-delet hasha'ar vatarats habayeta vataged lahem ki-feteros 'omed 'al-hapatach
vayomeru eleyha meshuga'at at vehi miteametset khi-khen hadavar vayomeru maleakho hu
ufeteros dofeq 'od vayifetechu vayireuhu vayitemahu
vayiremoz lahem beyado lachashot vayesaper lahem asher-hotsio haadon min-hamishemar vayomer hagidu et-zot leya'aqov velaachim vayetse vayelekhe-lo lemaqom acher
haboqer or umevukha raba hayeta beyn aneshey hatsava 'al-peteros vayomeru meh-haya lo
vayehi kaasher biqesh oto horedos velo metsao chaqar et-hashomerim vayetsav lehotsiam lamavet vayered mihuda el-qeysareya vayeshev sham
vehoredos az noter et-beney-tsor vetsidon vayavou elayv lev echad vayefatu et-belasetos asher 'al-chadar hamelekh vayevaqeshu shalom ya'an laqechu micheyat aretsotam meerets hamelekh
vayehi bayom hamu'ad vayilebash horedos levush malekhut vayeshev 'al-kise hamishepat vayatef aleyhem imerato
vayari'u lo ha'am lemor qol elohim hu velo qol adam
vayakehu maleakhe-yeho piteom 'eqev asher lo-natan kavod lelohim vayokheluhu tola'im vayamot
udevar elohim holekh varav
vayashuvu bar-naba veshaul mirushalayim acharey khalotam et-hashimush vayiqechu itam et-yochanan hamekhune mareqos
vaanashim neviim umelamedim hayu vaqehila asher beaneteyokheya bar-naba veshime'on haniqera nigar veluqeyos haqurini umenachem asher gudal 'im-horedos sar-harova' veshaul
vayehi besharatam beshem yeho uvetsumam vayomer rucha haqodesh havedilu li et bar-naba veet-shaul lamelakha asher qeratim lah
vayatsumu vayitepalalu vayisemekhu et-yedeyhem 'aleyhem vayeshalechum
vehema hasheluchim 'al-yedey rucha haqodesh yaredu el-seluqeya umisham bau vaoniya el-qiferos
vayavou el-'ir selamis vayagidu et-devar haelohim bevatey hakenesiot asher layehudim vayehi lahem gam-yochanan limesharet
vaya'averu bekhal-hai 'ad-pafos vayimetseu ish mekhashef echad nevi-sheqer ish yehudi ushemo bar-yeshu'a
asher haya 'im-seregios polos sar hamedina ish navon vehu qara elayv et-bar-naba veet-shaul vayiteav lishemo'a et-devar haelohim
vaya'amod lenegedam alima hamekhashef ki-ze perush shemo vayevaqesh lehatot et-hasar min-haemuna
veshaul haniqera gam-polos male rucha haqodesh vayisetakel bo
vayomer ata hamale khal-mirema vekhal-'avela ben-beliya'al vesone khal-tsedeq halo techedal lesalef et-darekhey yeho hayesharim
ve'ata hine yad-yeho bekha vehayita 'iver velo tiree et-hashemesh 'ad-'et mo'ed vatipol 'alayv piteom afela vachashekha vayifen hena vahena vayevaqesh ish leholikho veyado
vehasar kaasher raa et-asher na'asa heemin vayishetomem 'al-torat haadon
vayetseu polos vehaanashim asher ito mipafos vayeredu vaoniya vayavou el-peregi asher befamepuleya vesham niferad yochanan me'aleyhem vayashav yerushalayim
vehema nase'u miperegi vayavou el-aneteyokheya asher befisideya vayavou el-beyt hakeneset beyom hashabat vayeshevu
vayehi achar qeriat hatora vehaneviim vayishelechu aleyhem rashey hakeneset lemor anashim achim im-yesh lakhem devar-musar la'am daberu
vayaqam polos vayanef yado vayomar aneshey yiserael veyireey elohim shema'u
elohey ha'am haze elohey yiserael bachar baavoteynu vayeromem et-ha'am biheyotam gerim beerets mitserayim uvizero'a rama hotsiam misham
vayisa otam vayekhalekelem bamidebar keareba'im shana
vayashemed shive'a goyim beerets kena'an vayechaleq et-aretsam lahem lenachala
veacharey-khen natan lahem shofetim keareba' meot vachamishim shana 'ad-yemey shemuel hanavi
vayishealu melekh vayiten lahem elohim et-shaul ben-qish ish mishevet bineyamin areba'im shana
vekhahasiro oto vayaqem et-david lemelekh 'aleyhem asher gam-he'id 'alayv lemor matsati david et-ben-yishay ish kilevavi vehu ya'ase et-kal-chefetsi
umizare'o heqim haelohim kefi hahavetacha goel leyiserael et-yeshu'a
asher lifeney voo qidem yochanan liqero et-tevilat hateshuva el-kal-'am yiserael
vayehi kekhalot yochanan et-merutsato vayomer lemi tacheshevuni lo ani hu ki hine hu-va acharay vaani neqalti mehatir et-na'aley ragelayv
anashim achim beney mishepachat averaham veyireey elohim asher beqirebekhem lakhem shalucha devar hayeshu'a hazot
ki-yshevey yerushalayim verasheyhem ya'an asher lo hikiruhu mileu bemishepatam asher shefatuhu et-diverey haneviim haniqeraim bekhal-shabat
veaf ki-lo matseu-vo mishepat-mavet shaalu meet pilatos lahamito
vekhaasher hishelimu et-kal-hadevarim haketuvim 'alayv horidu oto min-ha'ets vayanichuhu baqaver
aval haelohim heqimo min-hametim
vayera yamim rabim el-ha'olim ito min-hagalil yerushalayema vehema 'ata 'edayv el-ha'am
vegam anachenu mevaserim etekhem et-besorat hahavetacha asher hayeta laavoteynu ki otah qiyem haelohim levaneynu bahaqimo et-yeshu'a
kakatuv bamizemor hasheni beni ata ani hayom yelidetikha
ve'al-haqimo oto min-hametim levileti shuv 'od lashachat ko amar eten lakhem chasedey david haneemanim
'al-ken omer gam-bemaqom acher lo-titen chasidekha lireot shachat
ki david bedoro sheret et-'atsat haelohim vayigeva' vayeasef el-avotayv vayare et-hashachat
vaasher haelohim heqim oto hu lo-raa hashachat
lakhen anashim achim yivada' lakhem ki 'al-yedey-ze tiqare lakhem selichat hachataim
vekhal-hamaamin yitsedaq bo lekhol asher lo-yekhaletem lehitsetadeq mimenu betorat mshe
lakhen hishameru lakhem pen-yavo 'aleykhem haneemar baneviim
reu bogedim vehitamehu vashomu ki-fo'al po'el ani bimeykhem po'al asher lo taaminu ki-yesupar lakhem
vayehi betsetam mibeyt hakeneset vayevaqeshu mehem ledaber aleyhem et-hadevarim haele bashabat habaa
uvehipared haqahal ish mere'ehu rabim min-hayehudim umigerey hatsedeq halekhu acharey folos uvar-naba vehema diberu 'al-libam vayazehirum la'amod bechesed haelohim
uvashabat hashenit niqehala kime'at kal-ha'ir lishemo'a et-devar yeho
vayehi kireot hayehudim et-hamon ha'am vayimaleu qinea vayakhechishu et-diverey folos hakhechesh vegadef

az ya'anu polos uvar-naba bifeneyhem lemor bedin haya lehashemi'a etekhem et-devar haelohim barishona ve'ata acharey asher-measetem oto vedanetem 'al 'atsemekhem sheeynekhem zakaim lechayey 'olam lakhen hinenu fonim el-hagoyim
ki khen amar lanu yeho netatikha leor goyim liheyot yeshu'ati 'ad-qetse haarets
vayisheme'u hagoyim vayisemechu vayehalalu et-devar yeho vayaaminu kol asher hayu mezumanim lechayey 'olam
vayiferots devar-yeho bekhal-hamaqom
vehayehudim hesitu et-hanashim hachasidot vehayeqarot veet-atsiley ha'ir vaye'oraru redifa 'al-polos uvar-naba vayegarashum migevulam
vehema ni'aru 'aleyhem et-he'afar me'al rageleyhem vayelekhu leiqaneyon
vehatalemidim maleu simecha verucha haqodesh
vayehi veiqaneyon vayavou yachedav el-beyt hakeneset asher layehudim vayedaberu-sham 'ad ki-heemin hamon rav min-hayehudim umin-hayevanim
vehayehudim asher lo heeminu 'oraru vehikhe'isu et-nafeshot hagoyim 'al-haachim
vayeshevu-sham yamim rabim vayelamedu uma'uzam yeho hame'id 'al-devar chasedo ba'asoto 'al-yadam otot umofetim
vayechaleq hamon ha'ir lachetsi chetseyam haya acharey hayehudim vechetseyam acharey hashelichim
vayehi ki rageshu hagoyim vehayehudim hema verasheyhem lehite'alel bahem ulesaqelam
vayivada' lahem vayimaletu le'arey luqoneya el-lusetera vederebi usevivotan
vayevaseru-sham habesora
veish nekhe ragelayim belusetera yshev tachetayv pisecha mibeten imo velo hilekh miyamayv
vayishema' et-polos medaber vehu hisetakel bo vayare ki-emuna vo lehivashe'a
vayomer beqol gadol 'amod hakhen 'al-rageleykha vayedaleg vayitehalakh
vahamon ha'am rau et asher 'asa folos vayiseu et-qolam vayedaberu belashon luqonit lemor haelohim yaredu eleynu bidemut anashim
vayiqereu levar-naba yupiter ulefolos qareu heremis baasher hu rosh hamedaberim
vekhohen beyt-yupiter lifeney ha'ir ba hasha'era bishevarim uva'atarot vayachepots lizebocha hu vahamon ha'am
vayehi kishemo'a zot hashelichim polos uvar naba vayiqere'u et-bigedeyhem vayarutsu el-tokhe-ha'am

vayitse'aqu vayomeru anashim lama ta'aso khazot gam-anachenu veney-adam chalashim kemokhem unevasera etekhem lema'an tashuvu min-haveleykhem ele el-elohim chayim asher 'asa et-hashamayim veet-haarets veet-hayam veet-kal-asher-bam
vaasher bedorot qedem hinicha lekhal-hagoyim lalekhet bedarekheyhem
vegam lo-chadal leha'id 'al-'atsemo vayeytev lanu betito matar min-hashamayim ve'itot sava' vayemale liboteynu mazon vesason
veaf badevarim haele berov 'amal mane'u et-ha'am mizevocha lahem
vayavou shama yehudim min-aneteyokheya umin-iqaneyon vayasitu et-ha'am vayiregemu et-polos baavanim vayisechavuhu chutsa la'ir ki chashavuhu lemet
vayasobu oto hatalemidim vayaqam vayavo ha'ira umimachorat yatsa el-derebi hu uvar-naba
vayevaseru et-habesora ba'ir hahi veacharey ha'amidam talemidim harebe shavu el-lusetera veiqaneyon veaneteyokheya
vayechazequ et-lev hatalemidim vayazehiru otam la'amod baemuna vekhi raq-betsarot rabot bo navo el-malekhut haelohim
vayivecharu lahem zeqenim bekhal-qehila uqehila vayitepalalu vayatsumu vayafeqidum beyad haadon asher heeminu vo
vaya'averu befisideya vayavou el-pamepuleya
vayashemi'u et-devar yeho beferegi vayeredu el-ataleya
umisham bau vaoniya el-aneteyokheya asher nimeseru-sham lechesed elohim 'al-hamelakha asher kilu otah
vayavou vayaqehilu et-ha'eda vayagidu et kal-asher 'asa itam haelohim veet asher-patach lagoyim petach haemuna
vayeshevu sham 'im-hatalemidim yamim lo me'at
vayeredu anashim mihuda vehem morim et-haachim lemor im-lo timolu kedat mshe lo tivashe'un
vayehi riv umachaloqet raba lefolos ulevar-naba 'imahem vayigezeru sheya'alu polos uvar-naba vaacherim mehem lirushalayim el-hashelichim vehazeqenim 'al hasheela hazot
vatelave otam haqehila vaya'averu et-pinuqeya veet-shomeron vehem mesaperim et-teshuvat hagoyim vayisemechu kal-haachim simecha gedola
vayehi kevoam yerushalayim vayeqabelu otam haqehila vehashelichim vehazeqenim vayagidu lahem et-asher higedil haelohim la'asot 'imahem
vayaqumu anashim maaminim mikat haperushim vayomeru lamul otam uletsaotam lishemor et-torat mshe
vayiqahalu hashelichim vehazeqenim le'ayen badavar haze
vayehi birevot hamachaloqet vayaqam peteros vayomer aleyhem anashim achim atem yeda'etem ki miyamim rishonim bi bachar haelohim mikulanu lishemo'a hagoyim mipi et-devar habesora veyaaminu
vehaelohim yode'a halevavot he'id 'aleyhem betito gam-lahem et-rucha haqodesh kaasher natan lanu
velo hivedil beyneynu uveyneyhem ki tihar et-levavam 'al-yedey haemuna
ve'ata mah-tenasu et-haelohim lasom 'ol 'al-tsaverey hatalemidim asher gam-avoteynu gam anachenu lo yakholenu laset
aval maaminim anachenu ki vechesed yeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu nivashe'a kemohem kamonu
vayacharishu khal-haqahal vayisheme'u el-bar-naba veel-polos mesaperim et-haotot vehamofetim asher hireba haelohim la'asot 'al-yedeyhem beqerev hagoyim
vayekhalu ledaber vaya'an ya'aqov vayomar anashim achim shime'u elay
shime'on siper et-asher raa haelohim batechila laqachat 'am lishemo mibeyn hagoyim
velazot masekimim diverey haneviim kakatuv
acharey-khen ashuv veaqim et-sukat david hanofelet vaharisoteyha aqim uvenitiha
lema'an yidereshu sheerit adam et-yeho vekhal-hagoyim asher niqera shemi 'aleyhem neum-yeho 'ose khal-ele
noda'im lelohim me'olam kal-ma'asayv
ve'al-ken ani dan shel lehachamir 'al-hashavim min-hagoyim lelohim
raq likhetov aleyhem asher yirechaqu mitumeot haelilim umin-hazenut umibesar hanechenaq umin-hadam
ki midorot 'olam yesh-lemshe doreshim bekhal-'ir va'ir umidey shabat beshabato yiqare bevatey khenesiot

vayitav be'eyney hashelichim vehazeqenim uve'eyney khal-haqahal livechor mehem anashim lishelocha otam el-aneteyokheya 'im-polos uvar-naba et-yehuda hamekhune bar-shaba veet-sila aneshey-shem betokh haachim
vayikhetevu vayishelechu 'al-yadam lemor anachenu hashelichim vehazeqenim vehaachim shoalim shelom haachim asher min-hagoyim beaneteyokheya uvesureya uveqiliqeya
ya'an uveya'an shama'enu ki yatseu meitanu mevalebelim etekhem umeqaleqelim nafeshoteykhem bidevarim beameram lakhem lehimol velishemor et-hatora asher lo tsivinu otam
lakhen tov be'eyney khulanu yachedav livechor anashim lishelocha aleykhem 'im bar-naba ufolos chaviveynu

vehem heviu et-hana'ar chay vayenuchamu 'ad-meod
vaanachenu qidamenu laredet baoniya vana'avor asosa laqachat-sham itanu et-polos ki-khen tsiva vehu omer lalekhet shama beragelayv
vayifegosh otanu beasos vaniqach oto vanavo el-mitulini
umisham yatsanu vaoniya vanifega' mimachorat el-mul kios uvayom hashelishi 'avarenu el samos vanalen biteroguleyon ulemachorato banu el-militos
ki-folos amar la'avor me'al-peney efesos levileti hitsetarekh lehitemahemeha beaseya ki ats ulay yukhal lavo lechag hashavu'ot yerushalayim
umimilitos shalach el-efesos vayiqera et-ziqeney haqehila
vayavou elayv vayomer lahem atem yeda'etem et asher hayiti 'imakhem bekhal-'et lemin-hayom harishon asher darekha rageli beaseya
asher 'avadeti et-haadon ba'anava uvidema'ot harebe uvemasot hamotseot oti benikheley hayehudim
velo-khichadeti mikem kal-devar to'elet vehigadetiv lakhem velimadeti etekhem barabim uvekhal-bayit vavayit
vaazeher hayehudim vehayevanim 'al-hateshuva lelohim ve'al haemuna baadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
ve'ata hineni holekh yerushalayim vaani asir harucha velo eda' mah-yiqereni sham
efes ki-rucha haqodesh me'id bekhal-'ir va'ir lemor ki-moserot vetsarot nakhonu li
veanokhi lo achush leachat mehena vegam-nafeshi lo yaqera ve'eynay mikalot besimecha et-merutsati veet-hasherut asher qibaleti meet haadon yeshu'a leha'id 'al-besorat chesed elohim
ve'ata hine anokhi yode'a ki atem kulekhem asher hitehalakheti beqirebekhem halokh vehasheme'a et-malekhut yeho ki lo-tosifu 'od reot panay
'al-ken me'id ani vakhem hayom haze ki-naqi anokhi midemey khulekhem
ki lo khichadeti mehagid lakhem et-'atsat haelohim kulah
lakhen shimeru et-nafeshoteykhem veet-kal-ha'eder asher bo heqim etekhem rucha haqodesh lifeqidim lire'ot et-'adat haadon asher qanah-lo bedamo shelo
ki yode'a ani asher acharey tseti yavou vetokhakhem zeevim 'azim asher lo-yachusu 'al-ha'eder
vegam-miqirebekhem yaqumu anashim doverey tahepukhot lehatot achareyhem et-hatalemidim
'al-ken sheqodu vezikheru ki shalosh shanim yomam valayela lo chadaleti ledaber 'al-lev kal-echad mikem bedime'a
ve'ata achay e'ezavekhem lelohim velidevar chasedo asher-lo ha'oz livenot etekhem velatet lakhem nachala beqerev kal-hamequdashim
lo chamadeti kesef ish o zehavo o levusho
veatem yeda'etem ki-yaday ele 'aso be'ad tserakhay uve'ad tsarekhey haholekhim iti
uvakol hereeyti etekhem ki khen 'aleynu la'amol litemokh ba'amal yadeynu et-hachalashim velizekor et-diverey haadon yeshu'a ki-hu amar tov asher-titen mishetiqach
veacharey dabero et-hadevarim haele kara' 'al-birekayv vayitepalel 'im-kulam
vayiveku khulam bekhi gadol vayipelu 'al-tsaverey folos vayenashequ lo
uveyoter hite'atsevu 'al-hadavar asher diber ki lo-yosifu 'od lireot panayv vayelavuhu el-haoniya
vayehi kaasher niferadenu mehem vanered baoniya vanavo derekh yeshara el-qos umimachorat el-rodos umisham el-patara
sham matsanu oniya 'overet el-pinuqeya vanered-bah vana'avor
vanere et-peney qiferos vehi misemolenu vana'avor me'aleyha el-sureya vanagi'a el-tsor ki-shama yotsiu et-masa haoniya
vanimetsa et-hatalemidim vaneshev sham shive'at yamim vehem ameru el-polos 'al-pi harucha levileti 'alot yerushalayim
vayehi bimelot lanu hayamim vanetse lalekhet ledarekenu vehem kulam melavim otanu 'im-nesheyhem ve'im-tapam 'ad-michuts la'ir vanikhera' 'al-birekeynu 'al-chof hayam vanitepalal
vanevarekh ish et-re'ehu vanered baoniya vehema shavu ish leveyto
vaanachenu kilinu et-derekh hayam vanered mitsor el-'ako vanisheal lishelom haachim vaneshev itam yom echad
umimachorat nasa'enu polos vaasher ito vanavo el-qeysareya vanelekh el-beyt filipos hamevaser asher hu echad min-hashive'a vaneshev 'imo
velo areba' banot betulot mitenabeot
vayehi biheyotenu sham yamim rabim vayered navi echad mihuda ushemo agavos
vayavo etselenu vayiqach et-ezor polos vayeesar-bo et-yadayv veet-ragelayv vayomer ko amar rucha haqodesh kakha yaaseru hayehudim birushalayim et-haish asher-lo haezor haze veyasegiruhu bidey hagoyim
vayehi kaasher shama'enu et-hadavar haze vanevaqesh mimenu anachenu veaneshey hamaqom asher lo-ya'ale yerushalayim
vaya'an polos vayomar mah-lakhem ki tiveku vetamesu et-levavi vaani hineni-nakhon leheaser vegam-lamut birushalayim ba'avur shem yeshu'a haadon
velo-ava shemo'a vaniref mimenu vanomar retson yeho ye'ase
veacharey hayamim hahem nasanu et-keleynu vana'al yerushalayim
vayelekhu itanu gam-talemidim miqeysareya vayaviu otanu lalun beveyt-ish qiferosi ushemo menason vehu talemid miyamim rabim
vayehi kevoenu yerushalayim vayeqabelu otanu haachim besimecha
umimachorat hayom nikhenas polos 'imanu el-ya'aqov vayavou shama kal-hazeqenim
vayisheal lahem leshalom vayesaper achat leachat et asher 'asa haelohim lagoyim besheruto
vayisheme'u vayehalalu et-haelohim vayomeru elayv hinekha roe achinu kama ribo yehudim bau lehaamin vekhulam meqaneim latora
vehem shame'u 'aleykha lemor telamed et-kal-hayehudim asher beqerev hagoyim lasur meacharey mshe beamerekha sheeynam chayavim lamul et-beneyhem velo lalekhet bechuqot hatora
ve'ata mah-la'asot hine yeasef haqahal ki yisheme'u ki-vata
lakhen asher nomar eleykha oto 'ase

hine areba'a anashim itanu asher nezirut 'aleyhem veata qach otam vehitaher itam vehotse 'aleyhem et-hotsaat hatigelachat veyade'u khulam ki-shema' shave shame'u 'aleykha vegam-ata holekh bechuqot hatora
ve'al-devar hamaaminim min-hagoyim katavenu vegazarenu asher lo yishemeru davar min-hadevarim hahem raq asher yishameru mizivechey elilim umin-hadam umibesar hanechenaq umin-hazenut
vayiqach polos et-haanashim vayitaher itam umimachorat ba el-hamiqedash vayaged ki-maleu yemey tahoratam 'ad ki-haqerav qareban kal-echad mehem
vayehi kimelot shive'at hayamim vehayehudim asher measeya rau oto bamiqedash vaye'oraru et-kal-hehamon vayishelechu yadam bo

vayize'aqu lemor aneshey yiserael 'azoru ze hu haish asher beazeney kal-adam uvekhal-haarets yedaber sara 'al-ha'am haze ve'al hatora ve'al hamaqom haze vegam-hevi el-hamiqedash anashim yevanim vayechalel et-hamaqom haqadosh haze
ki hayu roim et-terofimos haefesi ba'ir ito usevurim shepolos hevi oto el-hamiqedash
vatehom kal-ha'ir vayarats ha'am vayiqahalu vayochazu et-polos vayisechavuhu el-michuts lamiqedash ukherega' sugeru hadelatot
vehema mevaqeshim lahamito vehashemu'a vaa el-sar haelef shel-hagedud ki yerushalayim navokha khulah
vayemaher vayiqach ito aneshey tsava vesarey meot vayarats aleyhem vayehi khireotam et-sar haelef veet-aneshey hatsava vayachedelu lehakot et-polos
vayigash sar-haelef vayachazeq-bo vayetsav leasero binechushetayim vayisheal mi ze uma ma'asehu
vaya'an ha'am vayomeru ele vekho veele vekho velo yakhol lada'at davar barur merov hashaon vayetsav leholikho el-hametsad
vayehi kevoo 'ad-hama'alot vayisauhu aneshey hatsava mipeney chamat ha'am
ki-'am rav holekh acharayv vehem tso'aqim veomerim hashemed oto
vekhaasher hiqeriv polos leheasef el-hametsad vayomer el-sar haelef hatanicha li ledaber eleykha davar vayomer hatishema' yevanit
halo hamitseri ata asher lifeney hayamim haele he'ir mered vehotsi hamidebara areba'at alafim aneshey damim
vayomer polos ish yehudi anokhi mitaresos ezerach be'ir ba'alat shem asher beqiliqeya veesheala meitekha hanicha li vaadaber el-ha'am
vayanach lo vaya'amod polos 'al-hama'alot vayanef yado el-ha'am vatehi demama raba vayedaber belashon 'iverit vayomar
achay vaavotay shime'u-na vaadabera veetsetadeq lifeneykhem
vayehi keshame'am ki hu medaber aleyhem belashon 'iverit vayosifu 'od lachashot
vayomar ish-yehudi anokhi taresos asher beqiliqeya moladeti uva'ir hazot gadaleti lerageley gameliel velumadeti toratenu lekhal-diqeduqeyha vaehi meqane lelohim kemokhem kulekhem hayom
vaaradef et-ochazey haderekh hahi 'ad-mavet vaehi oser umasegir lakele anashim venashim
kaasher gam-ya'id 'alay hakohen hagadol vekhal-beyt hazeqenim asher mehem qibaleti mikhetavim vaelekh el-haachim ledameseq leesor af-et-hanimetseim shama ulehaviam yerushalayim lema'an yivaseru
vayehi ke'et tsahorayim veanokhi holekh veqarev ledamaseq vehine or gadol min-hashamayim nagah 'alay misaviv
vaepolo aretsa vaeshema' qol midaber elay lemor shaul shaul lama tiredefeni
vaa'an vaomar mi ata adoni vayomer elay ani yeshu'a hanatseri asher ata rodef
vehaanashim asher iti rau et-haor vayirau veet-qol hamedaber elay lo shame'u
vaomar mah-e'ese adoni vayomer elay haadon qum lekh el-dameseq vesham yugad lekha et-kol asher tsuveyta la'asot
vaani lo-yakholeti lireot mipeney zohar haor hahu vayachaziqu haanashim asher iti beyadi vayolikhuni vaavo ledamaseq
vesham ish yere elohim kefi hatora ushemo chananeya asher qana lo shem tov beqerev kal-hayehudim hayshevim sham
vayavo elay vayigash vayomer elay shaul achi peqach 'eyneykha uvasha'a hahi nifeqechu 'eynay vaereehu
vayomar elohey avoteynu bachar bekha lada'at et-retsono velireot et-hatsadiq velishemo'a qol mipihu
ki tiheyeh-lo le'ed 'al-hadevarim asher raita veshama'eta neged kal-beney adam
ve'ata lama titemahemeha qum vehitavel vehiterachets mechatoteykha beqareakha beshem haadon
vayehi beshuvi el-yerushalayim vaetepalel bamiqedash vatehi 'alay yad-yeho
vaere oto medaber elay chusha tse vimehera mirushalayim ki lo-yeqabelu et-'edutekha 'alay
vaomar adoni halo hem yode'im et asher-hishelakheti el-hakele vehileqeyti bevatey khenesiot et hamaaminim bakh
uvehishafekh dam-isetefanos 'edekha af-ani 'amadeti sham vaani chafets baharegato veshomer et-bigedey horegayv
vayomer elay lekh ki ani el hagoyim 'ad-lemerachoq ashalecheaa
vayisheme'u elayv 'ad-hadavar haze vayiseu et-qolam vayomeru hashemed ish kaze me'al haadama ki lo rauy lo sheyicheye
vayehi biheyotam tso'aqim umashelikhim et-bigedeyhem me'aleyhem vezoreqim 'afar hashamayema
vayetsav sar haelef leholikho el-hametsad vayomer lehaleqot oto velivedoq lema'an yeda' madu'a 'alayv hatse'aqa hazot
vayehi kaasher aseru oto lehakoto viretsu'ot vayomer el-sar hamea ha'omed 'alayv haaf risheyon lakhem lehakot ish romi belo-din uvelo mishepat
vayishema' sar hamea et-hadavar haze vayelekh vayaged lesar haelef lemor ree mah-ta'ase ki haish haze romi hu
vayavo sar-haelef vayomar haged-li haromi ata vayomer romi
vaya'an sar haelef ani bekhesef rav qaniti li mishepat haezerachut hazot vayomer polos vaani yuladeti vah
az hirepu mimenu haanashim asher bau levadeqo vesar haelef yare meod ki-asar oto vehu romi
umimachorat biqesh lada'at barur 'al-me hayehudim mechayevim oto vayater moserotayv vayetsav lehavi et-rashey hakohanim veet kal-hasanehederin vayored et-polos vaya'amidehu lifeneyhem
vayabet polos basanehederin vayomar anashim achim betumat levavi hitehalakheti lifeney elohim 'ad hayom haze
vayetsav chananeya hakohen hagadol et-ha'omedim 'alayv lehakoto 'al-piv
vayomer elayv polos 'atid elohim lehakotekha haqir hamesuyad haumenam yshev ata ladin oti katora veata metsave lehakoti shelo khatora
vayomeru ha'omedim sham et-hakohen hagadol lelohim techaref
vayomer polos achay lo yada'eti asher hu hakohen hagadol ki khatuv nasi ve'amekha lo taor
ufolos yada' ki miqetsatam tsaduqim umiqetsatam perushim vayiqera beazeney sanehederin lemor anashim achim parush ben-parush anokhi ve'al-tiqevat hametim utechiyatam ani nadon
uvedabero hadavar haze haya riv beyn hatsaduqim uveyn haperushim vayechaleq hehamon
ki hatsaduqim omerim eyn techiya veeyn maleakh varucha vehaperushim modim bisheneyhem
vatehi hamula gedola vayaqumu hasoferim asher mikat haperushim vayitevakechu-lemor lo-matsanu davar ra' baish haze veim-rucha diber elayv o maleakh al-nilachama belohim
vehariv holekh vechazeq vesar-haelef yare pen-yeshase'u et-polos vayetsav et-aneshey hatsava laredet velachatof oto mitokham uleehavio el-hametsad
vehaadon nitsav 'alayv balayela hahu vayomer chazaq polos ki kaasher ha'idota li birushalayim ken ha'ed ta'id beromi
vayehi lifenot haboqer vayitechaberu hayehudim vayaaseru isar 'al-nafesham im yokhelu veim yishetu 'ad im-yaharegu et-polos
vehabaim baala hazot hayu yoter meareba'im ish
vayigeshu el-rashey hakohanim veel hazeqenim lemor isar asarenu 'al-nafeshenu levileti te'om meuma 'ad im-haragenu et-polos
ve'ata hodi'u-na atem vesanehederin et-sar haelef vayoridehu machar aleykhem keilu tachepetsu lachaqor 'alayv heytev vaanachenu nekhonim lahamito beterem yiqerav aleykhem
vayishema' ben-achot polos et-arebam vayelekh vayavo el-hametsad vayaged lefolos
vayiqera folos leechad misarey hameot vayomer elayv qach et-habachur haze el-sar haelef ki-davar lo lehodi'o
vayeviehu el-sar haelef vayomar polos haasir qeraani elayv vayevaqesh mimeni lehavi eleykha et-habachur haze ki-davar lo lehagid lakh
vayochez sar haelef beyado vayasar 'imo levado vayomer elayv ma hadavar asher todi'eni
vayomar ki-no'atsu hayehudim yachedav levaqesh mimekha lehorid et-polos machar lifeney sanehederin keilu chafetsim lada'at heytev et-'ineyano
veata al-tishema' lahem ki orevim lo mehem yoter meareba'im ish asher aseru isar 'al-nafesham levileti akhol ushetot 'ad im-hemituhu vehema 'ata 'omedim umechakim lidevarekha
vayeshalach sar-haelef et-habachur vayetsav 'alayv asher lo yagid leish ki gilah-lo et-hadavar haze
vayiqera lisheney sarey meot vayomar hechaletsu meitekhem aneshey-tsava matayim lalekhet leqeysareya ufarashim shive'im umshekhey qeshet matayim sof-hasha'a hashelishit balayela
uvehemot yakhinu leharekiv et-polos lema'an havio shalem el-filikhas hahegemon
vayikhetov igeret uvah kadevarim haele
qelodeyos lusias lefilikhas hahegemon haadir shalom
et-haish haze tafeso hayehudim vayevaqeshu hamito vaavo 'im-aneshey hatsava vaafaletehu mitokham beshame'i ki-romi hu
uvaasher chafatseti lada'at 'al-me satenu oto horadetiv el-sanehederin shelahem
vaeda' ki-satenu oto 'al-diverey sheelot datam velo 'al-davar asher yiheye 'anesho 'alayv mita o moserot
ve'ata hine hugad-li shehayehudim mitenakelim baish haze vaeshelachehu eleykha miyad vegam et-stenayv tsiveyti lavo ulehagish sitenatam lefaneykha veata shalom
vayiqechu aneshey hatsava et-polos kaasher tsuuu vayeviuhu layela el-anetipateris
umimachorat hinichu et-haparashim lalekhet ito vayashuvu lametsad
veele bau el-qeysareya vayitenu et-haigeret bidey hahegemon vaya'amidu lefanayv gam et-polos
vayehi kiqero hahegemon et-haigeret vayisheal lada'at meey-zo medina hu vayehi kheshame'o ki-hu miqiliqeya vayomar
eshema' et-devareykha bevo gam-steneykha hena vayetsav leshamero beveyt hamishepat asher lehoredos
vayehi acharey chameshet yamim vayered chananeya hakohen hagadol veito hazeqenim veish devarim echad taretulos shemo vayodi'u et-hahegemon et-devar rivam 'im-polos
vayehi kaasher qareu-lo vayachel taretulos lechayev oto vayomar
'al-yadekha filikhas haadir yashavenu beshalom rav vetaqanot rabot na'aso la'am haze behashegachatekha 'al-ele anachenu modim lekha bekhal-panim uvekhal-maqom
velo ogi'akha harebe 'al-ken yiheyu devareynu me'atim veetechanen eleykha shetishema'enu kechemelatekha
ki matsanu et-haish haze keqetev umegare mideyanim beyn kal-hayehudim 'al-peney tevel vehu rosh kat hanatserim
vehu gam-nisa lechalel et-hamiqedash vanitepos oto vanachepots leshafeto 'al-pi toratenu
vayavo 'aleynu lusias sar-haelef berav-kocha vayachetefehu miyadeynu
vayetsav et-stenayv asher yavou lefaneykha veata ki-tachaqor oto tukhal lada'at mipihu et kal-hadevarim haele asher 'aleyhem anachenu mechayevim oto
vayemaleu hayehudim et-devarayv lemor ki-khen hu
vayiremoz hahegemon lefolos ledaber vaya'an vayomar ya'an asher yada'eti ki ze kame shanim shofet ata la'am haze hineni mitsetadeq 'al-'ineyanay velibi batucha
ata tukhal lada'at asher lo 'averu yoter misheneym 'asar yom me'et 'aloti yerushalayim lehishetachaot
velo vamiqedash metsauni mitevakecha 'im-ish o-me'orer mehuma ba'am velo bevatey khenesiot velo va'ir
gam eyn lahem reaya lemah-shemechayevim oti
aval et-zot mode ani lefaneykha ki baderekh hahi asher yiqerauha beshem kat bah ani 'oved et-elohey avoteynu behaamini bekhal-hakatuv batora uvaneviim
vaaqave lelohim ki 'atida liheyot techiyat hametim latsadiqim velaresha'im asher gam-hem yechaku-lah
lakhen ani 'amel liheyot temim-lev 'im elohim veadam tamid
umiqets shanim rabot bati lehavi nedavot le'ami ulehaqeriv qarebanot
uvaele metsauni anashim yehudim measeya acharey hitahari bamiqedash lo vahamon-'am velo bimehuma
asher 'aleyhem haya la'amad-po lefaneykha vela'anot bi im-yesh lahem devar riv 'alay
o ele ve'atsemam yagidu-na mah-matseu vi 'avel be'amedi lifeney sanehederin
bileti im-hadavar haechad haze asher qarati be'amedi vetokham ki 'al-techiyat hametim ani nidon hayom lifeneykhem
vayehi kishemo'a filikhas et-hadevarim haele vaya'aver et-dinam le'et acheret ki 'ineyeney haderekh hazot node'u lo heytev vayomer beredet elay lusias sar haelef eshepot mishepatekhem
vayetsav et-sar hamea lasom et-polos bamishemar velatet-lo revacha ulevileti meno'a ish mimeyuda'ayv misharet oto umibo elayv
veacharey yamim achadim ba filikhas hu uderusila isheto vehi yehudit vayishelach liqero lefolos vayishema' elayv 'al-devar haemuna bamashicha
vayehi kedabero 'al-hatsedeq ve'al-haperishut ve'al-hadin he'atid lavo vayecherad filikhas vaya'an vayomar lekhe-na 'ata velikhesheefene ashuv liqero-lakh
vehu meqave lefolos ki yiten-lo shochad lema'an yatirehu uva'avur ze qara lo pe'amim harebe vayedaber 'imo
vayehi miqets shenatayim yamim vayaqam pareqios pesetos tachat filikhas ufilikhas chafets lehareot chesed el-hayehudim velo hitir et-polos mibeyt haasurim
vayavo fesetos el-hamedina vaya'al acharey sheloset yamim miqeyserin lirushalayim
vehakohen hagadol verashey hayehudim hodi'uhu et-rivam 'im-polos
vayifetseru-vo vayishealu mimenu la'asot chesed 'imahem lahavio yerushalayim vehema mitenakelim oto lahamito badarekh
vayaged lahem pesetos ki-'atsur polos qeysareya vegam-hu yashuv shama beqarov
vayomer lakhen yeredu iti ha'atsumim shebakhem veim-yesh meum baish haze ya'anu vo
vayeshev betokham lo yoter miyamim shemona o 'asara vayered el-qeyserin umimachorat yashav 'al-kise hamishepat vayetsav lehavi et-polos
hu va vehayehudim asher yaredu mirushalayim sevavuhu vayaashimu et-polos ashamot rabot veqashot asher lo-yakhelu lehavi reaya 'aleyhen
vehu hitsetadeq lemor lo-chatati vimeuma lo ledat hayehudim velo lamiqedash velo leqeysar
ufesetos bechefetso lehareot chesed el-hayehudim vaya'an et-polos vayomar hatachepots la'alot yerushalayim lehishafet 'al-ele lefanay shama
vayomer polos lifeney kise mishepato shel-qeysar ani 'omed vesham eheye nidon lo hare'oti layehudim kaasher yada'eta heytev gam-ata
im-hare'oti veyesh-bi devar mishepat-mavet bal-echeskh nafeshi mimavet veim-eyn-bi davar mikol asher hem 'onim bi ish lo yukhal lehasegireni el-yadam et-qeysar ani qore ledini
vayiva'ats pesetos 'im-yo'atsayv vaya'an oto lemor et-qeysar qaraat el-qeysar telekh
vayehi miqets yamim vayeredu ageripas hamelekh uvereniqa el-qeysareya lisheol lefesetos leshalom
vayehi ki-arekhu lahem hayamim sham vayesaper pesetos lamelekh et-riv polos lemor hine ish asur bamaqom haze asher pilikhas hisheiro acharayv
uviheyoti virushalayim diberu elay rashey hakohanim veziqeney hayehudim 'al-odotayv vayevaqeshu mimeni lehareshi'u
vaomar aleyhem ki eyn derekh haromiyim lehasegir ish beterem ya'amod hanite'an bifeney to'anayv venitan-lo maqom lehitsetadeq min-hasitena
velakhen kaasher bau hena chasheti velo hitemahemaheti ki mimachorat hayom yashaveti 'al-kise hamishepat vaatsave lehavi et-haish
vaya'amedu stenayv velo-higidu 'alayv davar ra' mimah-shechashadetiv bo
veraq hayu lahem diverey rivot 'alayv be'ineyan 'avodat eloheyhem ve'al-met echad yeshu'a shemo asher amar 'alayv polos ki hu chay
vayipale mimeni hadavar haze lamishepat vaomar hechafets ata lalekhet yerushalayim ulehishafet sham 'al-ele
vayisheal polos lehanicho vamishemar 'ad-tset mishepato milifeney agusetos vaatsave leshamero 'ad-asher eshelach oto el-qeysar
vayomer ageripas el-pesetos gam-ani chafets lishemo'a et-haish vayomer machar tishema'enu
vayehi mimachorat kevo ageripas uvereniqa behod gadol vayavou el-ulam hamishema'at hema vesarey haelef unegidey ha'ir vayetsav pesetos vayaviu et-polos

vayomer pesetos ageripas hamelekh vekhal-haanashim asher atem po itanu hinekhem roim et-haish asher ba'avuro page'u-vi kal-hamon hayehudim gam-birushalayim vegam-po vayize'aqu shel rauy lo sheyicheye 'od
vaani kaasher hikareti vo shel-'asa davar sheyiheye 'alayv chayav mita vegam-hu qara et-agusetos ledino ya'atseti lishelocha oto shama
akh eyn-li likhetov 'alayv davar nakhon laadoneynu uva'avur zot haviotiv lifeneykhem uveyoter lefaneykha hamelekh ageripas lema'an yechaqer veyada'eti ma ekhetov
ki lo-yitakhen be'eynay lishelocha asir velo odi'a gam et-'alilot hadevarim asher-samu lo
vayomer ageripas el-polos nitan-lekha ledaber be'ad nafeshekha az yitsetadeq polos vayoshet et-yado vayomar
measher ani nafeshi hamelekh ageripas ki lefaneykha etsetadeq hayom 'al-kol asher-to'anim 'alay hayehudim
ki ata yode'a heytev kal-haminehagim vehasheelot asher beyn hayehudim ve'al-ken esheala meitekha lishemo'a oti keorekh ruchekha
hine dareki mine'uray asher hitehalakheti-vah meaz betokh 'ami uvirushalayim yode'im otah kal-hayehudim
ki miyamim rishonim yeda'uni im-yiretsu leha'id ki kefarush hitenahageti 'al-pi hakat hamaqepedet beyoter ba'avodatenu
ve'ata ani 'omed lehishafet 'al-tiqevat hahavetacha asher hivetichah haelohim et-avoteynu
vaasher sheneym 'asar shevateynu meyachalim lehagi'a lah be'avedam et-yeho tamid yomam valayela 'al-devar hatiqeva hazot hamelekh ageripas hayehudim mevaqeshim lechayeveni
madu'a yipale ve'eyneykhem ki haelohim yechaye metim
hen lefanim ani chashaveti ledavar hagun litseror et-shem yeshu'a hanatseri 'ad-meod
kaasher 'asiti virushalayim vegam-qedoshim rabim ani hisegareti levatey khelaim bareshut asher qibaleti meet rashey hakohanim ve'im horegeyhem ratsiti
uvekhal-batey khenisiot yisareti otam pe'amim rabot vaanasetim legadef vaeteholala bam 'ad meod vaeredefem 'ad-le'arim asher chutsa laarets
vayehi belekheti 'al-hadavar haze ledamaseq bireshut rashey hakohanim uvemitsavatam
vaere adoni hamelekh le'et tsahorayim badarekh vehine or tsach mizohar hashemesh asher mishamayim nagah misaviv 'alay ve'al haholekhim iti
vanipol kulanu aretsa vaeshema' qol medaber elay belashon 'iverit lemor shaul shaul lama tiredefeni qashe lekha live'ot badarevonot
vaomar mi ata adoni vayomer anokhi yeshu'a asher ata rodef
aval qum va'amod 'al-rageleykha ki ba'avur zot nireeyti eleykha ba'avur evechar bekha limesharet ule'ed hadevarim asher raita vaasher are
behatsili otekha min-ha'am umin-hagoyim asher eshelachakha 'ata aleyhem
lifeqocha et-'eyneyhem lema'an yashuvu mechshekh leor umeyad hasatan el-haelohim veheeminu veniselach lechatotam vehayeta lahem hanachala betokh hamequdashim
'al-ken hamelekh ageripas lo himereyti et-hamaree asher raiti min-hashamayim
ki im-qarati rishona leyshevey dameseq virushalayim uvekhal-erets yehuda vegam lagoyim lemor hinachamu veshuvu el-haelohim va'aso ma'asim reuyim lateshuva
uvigelal hadavar haze tafeso oti hayehudim bamiqedash vayevaqeshu lahamiteni
vehaelohim haya ve'ezeri ve'ad-hayom haze 'omed ani ume'id lifeney qaton vegadol veeyneni medaber davar zulati hadevarim asher higidu haneviim umshe ki-'atidim hema lavo
she'atid hamashicha lehe'anot velaqum rishon min-hametim lehafits or ba'am uvagoyim
vayehi hu mitsetadeq bazot vayiqera fesetos beqol gadol lemor hinekha mishetage'a polos rov halimud heviakha lidey shiga'on
vayomer polos eyneni meshuga' pesetos haadir ki im-diverey emet vata'am abi'a
ki hamelekh yode'a et-ele ve'al-zot bevitachon ani medaber elayv ki echeshov shel-ne'elam mimenu davar min-hadevarim haele ki lo-veqeren zavit ne'eseta zot
hamelekh ageripas hamaamin ata baneviim yada'eti ki maamin ata
vayomer ageripas el-polos 'od me'at ufititani liheyot natseri
vayomer avaqesha meelohim asher beqarov o verachoq lo ata ki-gam levadekha ki-gam kal-hashome'im oti yiheyu khamoni zulati hamoserot haele
vayehi bedabero hadavar haze vayaqam hamaelekh vehahegemon uvereniqa vehayshevim itam
vayavou hachadera vayedaberu ish el-re'ehu lemor haish haze lo-'asa davar asher yiheye 'alayv chayav mita o moserot
vayomer ageripas el-pesetos haish haze yukhal latset chafeshi lule qara et-qeysar ledino
vekhaasher nigemar dinenu la'avor baoniya el-italeya maseru et-polos umiqetsat asirim acherim el-sar hamea ligedud agusetos ushemo yulios
vanered baoniya aderamitit nekhona lalekhet 'al-peney chof aseya vana'avor hayama vayehi itanu arisetarekhos maqedon min-taseloniqi
umimachorat higa'enu letsidon veyulios 'asa chesed 'im-polos vayanach lo lalekhet el-meyuda'ayv lema'an yashivu nafeshv
vanelekh misham vana'avor bisevivot qiferos ki haruchot hayu lenegedenu
vana'avor et-hayam asher lifeney qiliqeya ufamepuleya vanavo el-mura asher beluqeya
vayimetsa-sham sar hamea oniya alekhesanederit baa leitaleya vaya'avirenu el-tokhah
vehaoniya halekha bikhevedut yamim rabim veacharey asher yaga'enu uvanu el-mul qenidos lo hinichanu harucha lachetor el-hayabasha vana'avor mitsad qereyti 'al-peney har salemoni
veacharey asher 'avarenu bitelaot banu lemaqom echad qali limenes shemo uqerova lo 'ir vshemah lasiya
vayehi miqets yamim rabim higi'a 'et hasakana leyoredey hayam ki gam-hatsom kevar 'avar vayazeher otam polos
vayomer aleyhem anashim roe ani ki halikhatenu tiheye akhe-zadon venezeq gadol lo lamasa velaoniya levad ki im-gam lenafeshoteynu
vesar hamea shama' el-rav hachovel veel-ba'al haoniya veel-diverey folos lo shama'

uvaasher hachof lo tov la'amad-bo bimey hasetav ya'atsu harabim la'avor misham ki ameru ulay nukhal hagi'a lefeynikhas veyashavenu sham bimey hasetav vehu chof biqereyti pone lifeat darom ma'arava velifeat tsafon ma'arava
verucha nshevet leat min-hadarom vehem chshevim shetitselach 'atsatam vaya'alu ha'ogin vaya'averu le'umat sefat i qereyti
vekhime'at achar ken vatifega' bai rucha nachashol asher averiqelidon yiqare lah
vatetoraf haoniya velo-yakhela la'amod neged harucha vaneref yadeynu mimena vaninadef
vatarats haoniya el-'ever i-qaton qeloda shemo vekhime'at lo yakholenu leechoz ha'avara
veacharey mashekham otah aleyhem heviu le'ezeratam kal-asher hisiga yadam vayachebeshu et-dafeney haoniya umiyireatam pen-yipelu el-beyn rukhesey hachol horidu et haqela'im vana'avor halea
vayehi hasa'ar holekh veso'er 'aleynu umimacharat hetilu et-hamasa el-hayam
uvayom hashelishi hetilu videyhem et-keley haoniya el-hayam
vayehi yamim rabim gam-hashemesh gam-hakokhavim lo nireu vehase'ara chazeqa 'aleynu 'ad-meod vatikaret mimenu kal-tiqeva
ufolos 'amad betokham acharey haarikham batsom vayomar anashim lu shema'etem elay velo yetsatem miqereyti ki az lo qaranu hanezeq haze bemereyekhem
ve'ata ani omer aleykhem chizequ veimetsu ki lo-tovad nefesh mikem bileti haoniya levada
ki-valayela haze nitsav 'alay maleakh haelohim asher-lo anokhi vaasher ani 'oved oto
vayomar al-tira folos 'od 'amod ta'amod lifeney qeysar ve'ata hine natan-lekha haelohim et-kal-haholekhim itekha baoniya
'al-ken anashim chizequ veimetsu ki maamin ani lelohim ki-khen yiheye kaasher neemar elay
akh hashelekh nushelakh el-achad haiyim
vayehi kevo leyl areba'a 'asar letiletulenu beyam aderiya kachatsot halayela vayacheshevu hamalachim ki-qareva lahem yabashet
vayoridu et-haanakh vayimetseu 'omeq hayam 'eserim qoma vaya'averu me'at vayoridu et-haanakh shenit vayimetseu qomot chamesh 'esere
vayireu pen-yifege'u beshiney hasela'im vayashelikhu me'al-achorey haoniya areba'a 'oginim el-hayam vayikhesefu leor hayom
vehamalachim biqeshu liverocha min-haoniya vayoridu et-ha'avara el-hayam beameram ki yesh et-nafesham leshalecha 'oginim gam-merosh haoniya
vayomer polos el-sar hamea veel-aneshey hatsava lemor im-hem lo-ya'amedu 'itanu baoniya lo tukhelu atem lehinatsel
vayeqatsetsu aneshey hatsava et-chaveley ha'avara vayitenuha linepol
vehaboqer terem yeor vayevaqesh polos mikulam lite'am-lechem lemor hayom yom areba'a 'asar asher chikitem batsom velo te'ametem lachem
'al-ken qore ani etekhem lite'om lechem ki hu liteshu'atekhem ki ish mikem lo-yipol misa'arat rosho aretsa
hu diber et-hadevarim haele vehu laqach et-halechem vayode lelohim lifeney khulam vayivetsa' vayachel leekhol
vayeemats lev kulam vayite'amu-okhel gam-hema
vaanachenu kal-nefesh asher baoniya matayim veshive'im vashesh
vayokhelu lesave'a vayaqelu me'al-haoniya vayatilu et-hatseda el-hayam
haboqer or vehem lo hikiru et-haarets aval rau kemiferats hayam vechof lo vayiva'atsu lenaheg elayv et-haoniya im-yukhalu
vayegade'u et-ha'oginim vaya'azevum layam vayatiru gam-et-meyterey hamanehig vayifereso miferas hatoren el-peney harucha vayevaqeshu lavo el-hachof
vayifege'u vemaqom asher hayam misheney 'avarayv vatidebaq-bo haoniya vata'amod roshah lo yino'a vaachoreyha nisheberu misheon hagalim
vatehi 'atsat aneshey hatsava lehamit et-haasirim pen-yiseche ish mehem venimelat
vesar hamea chafets lehatsil et-polos vayane et-'atsatam vayomar hayode'a lisechot yered veya'avor layabasha barishona vehanishearim ele 'al-qerashim veele 'al-shiverey haoniya
vayehi-khen vayimaletu khulam el-hayabasha
vekhaasher nimelatenu noda' lanu ki-shem hai meliti
vehalo'azim lo hime'itu chasedam 'imanu ki-vi'aru esh vayaasefu et-kulanu aleyhem mipeney hageshem hayored umipeney haqor
ufolos asaf lo 'aremat qotsim vayasem 'al-hamoqed vayetse efe'e mipeney hachom vayochez beyado
vayireu halo'azim et-hasherets taluy 'al-yado vayomeru ish el-re'ehu akhen rotsech haish haze hanimelat min-hayam verucha naqam lo-hinicha lo licheyot
vayena'er hasherets me'al yado el-tokh haesh velo-hera' lo
vehem hochilu lo asher yitsebe gufo o-yipol met piteom vayachilu 'ad-bosh vehine lo-qarahu khal-ason vayehafekh libam vayomeru elohim hu
uvisevivey hamaqom hahu sadot asher lerosh aneshey hai ushemo fovelios hu hevi otanu leveyto vayekhalekel otanu betuvo shelshet yamim
vaavi fovelios nofel lemishekav baqadachat uvemachale hame'ayim vayavo elayv polos vayitepalel vayasem 'alayv et-yadayv vayirepaehu
veacharey-khen bau gam-hacholim haacherim asher bai vayerafeu
vayekhabedunu kavod gadol uvelekhetenu misham sipequ lenu dey tsarekenu
veacharey shelshet chodashim 'avarenu misham baoniya alekhesanederit asher 'ameda vai bimey hasetav veot digelah hateomim
vanavo el-sarequsa vaneshev-sham shelshet yamim
misham sabonu vanavo el-regeyon uvineshov rucha deromit beyom hamachorat banu bayom hasheni el-potioli

vayisheme'u haachim ki-vaim anachenu vayetseu misham liqeratenu 'ad leshuq apios ve'ad lishelshet hachanuyot vayare otam polos vayode lelohim vayitechazaq
veachar boenu el-romi he'evir sar hamea et-haasirim el-sar hatsava u lefolos hinichu lashevet levado 'im-ish hatsava hashomer oto

vehayehudim qamu-vi vaehi mukherach liqero et-qeysar ledini veeyn bilevavi liseton et-'ami
uva'avur zot qarati lakhem lireotekhem uledaber 'imakhem ki bigelal tiqevat yiserael asur ani bakevel haze
vayomeru elayv lo nitenu lanu igerot meerets yehuda 'al-odoteykha velo-va hena echad min-haachim asher higid o-diber 'aleykha davar ra'
amenam chafetsim anachenu lishemo'a et-asher bilevavekha ki noda' lanu asher bekhal maqom yarivu el-hakat hazot
vayasimu lo mo'ed vayavou elayv rabim el-melono vaya'ad bahem vayevaer et-malekhut elohim vayokhach lahem 'ineyeney yeshu'a mitorat mshe umin-haneviim miboqer 'ad-'arev
veyesh asher shame'u el-devarayv veyesh asher lo heeminu
vayehi ki chalequ veda'etam vayifenu vayelekhu ledarekam ufolos medaber raq hadavar haze heytev diber rucha haqodesh laavoteynu befi yesha'eyahu hanavi lemor
lekh veamareta la'am haze shime'u shamo'a veal-tavinu ureu rao veal-teda'u
ki shamen lev ha'am haze veazenayv kavedu veet-'enayv hesha' pen-yiree ve'eynayv uveazenayv yishema' ulevavo yavin veshav urefativ
lakhen de'u ki el-hagoyim nishelecha teshu'at elohim vehema yishema'u
